service.name: Lokalizacja wyciekow z rur
Pipe Leak Detection
service.description: Non-invasive leak detection in cold water, hot water, and central heating installations.

service.name: Ogrzewanie podlogowe
Underfloor Heating Diagnostics
service.description: Leak diagnostics in water-based underfloor heating using thermal imaging and tracer gas.
service.methods: Thermal imaging, Tracer gas, Pressure test

service.name: Dachy i tarasy
Roof and Terrace Waterproofing
service.description: Waterproofing integrity testing for flat roofs, terraces, and balconies.
service.methods: Smoke test, Moisture measurement, Dye test

service.name: Kanalizacja
Sewage Inspection
service.description: Sewage pipe inspection with endoscopic camera and UV dye tests.

service.name: Osuszanie po zalaniach
Post-Flood Drying
service.description: Professional building drying after floods in cooperation with trusted partners.

item.name: Geophone
item.purpose: Acoustic leak detection underground and in walls

item.name: Thermal imaging camera
item.purpose: Visualizing pipe paths and leak locations

item.name: Endoscopic camera
item.purpose: Visual inspection of sewage and drain pipes

item.name: UV dye kit
item.purpose: Locating sewage leaks with fluorescent dye
